response: This code implements the **Knuth-Morris-Pratt (KMP) string matching algorithm**, which efficiently searches for a pattern within a text by avoiding redundant character comparisons. The algorithm first preprocesses the pattern to build a "longest proper prefix which is also suffix" (LPS) array that helps skip unnecessary comparisons when a mismatch occurs, then uses this LPS array during the search phase to achieve O(n + m) time complexity where n is the text length and m is the pattern length.
